name: Automation Auditor
description: Multi-agent code evaluator with 3 LLM judges using dialectical reasoning.
achievement: Three specialised LLM agents debate code quality through structured argumentation.

name: Document Intelligence Refinery
description: Agentic pipeline that transforms unstructured documents into queryable knowledge bases.
achievement: Vision models + semantic chunking pipeline serving structured data via FastAPI.

name: Ethiopian Medical Platform
description: Full ELT platform: Telegram ingestion to YOLOv8 detection API.
achievement: End-to-end pipeline from raw chat data to star schema to computer vision model serving.

name: Intelligent Complaint Analysis
description: RAG-powered chatbot for analyzing unstructured customer complaints.
achievement: Retrieval-augmented generation over complaint corpus with Gradio interface.
